product_highlights: HumaColl21™ — human-identical collagen type XXI via precision fermentation
N-Collage — vegan collagen alternative without animal inputs
Elastapure™ — biodesigned elastin for skin elasticity
Proprietary protein design platform for novel bioactive molecules
notes: Geltor is a pioneering biodesign company creating the world's most advanced designer proteins through precision fermentation. Their HumaColl21™ is a human-identical collagen type XXI produced without animal inputs, offering superior biocompatibility compared to traditional marine or bovine collagen. Geltor's technology platform enables the creation of entirely new protein architectures not found in nature, opening new frontiers in cosmetic performance and representing the cutting edge of sustainable beauty ingredient innovation.
